unresolvedTextByHash.26e5de7bbf69b92dac606d21a3d8354c796b3e34: Ah, [?], you're finally here. Your task for this room is to defeat Sir Leye. He has been blessed by Saradomin to be undefeatable by any blade, so it should be quite a challenge for you.
